events.name: Symposium'26: SENTIENCE
events.description: An immersive tech symposium where AI meets human intelligence. Featuring a speaker session by Mr. Aniket Joshi (AVP at JPMorgan Chase, TEDx Speaker), Prize Distribution, Magazine Launch, Goodies and Food.
highlights: Speaker: Mr. Aniket Joshi - AVP at JPMorgan Chase & TEDx Speaker
events.fees: ₹100 for CSI Members, ₹150 for Non-CSI Members

events.name: MakerMania 2026
events.description: A month-long invention program where students go from Problem to Prototype to Patent. Build real hardware, file a provisional patent, and gain skills in 3D printing, PCB design, CNC machining and more.
highlights: Ideate, Build and Patent your own invention
Winners get help filing an Indian Provisional Patent
Workshops on Problem Hunting, Patent Laws, Pitch Perfect, Design Thinking
Skills: 3D Printing, Laser Cutting, PCB Design, Microcontrollers
events.registration: Registrations opening soon - contact Yash Patil: 91364 14509

events.name: UniMerge 1.0
events.description: A senior-hosted hackathon open to VESIT students. Build real projects across Web Dev, App Dev, and AI/ML tracks in 24 hours.
highlights: Tracks: Web Development, App Development, AI/ML

events.name: Agents at Work Workshop
events.description: Workshop on building AI agents and automating the real world using n8n and Gemini. Speaker: Hannan Chougle, Tech Lead GDG VESIT and Sr. Tech Manager CodeCell++.
events.registration: Check GDG VESIT community for link
